REASONING:  
I spot-checked the arithmetic and logic in a broad spread of rounds.  
• Round 0:  
  – e = 0x510E527F, S1 reported on L0070 = 0x3587272B.

• Round 1:

  – Adding ch (L0085) gives 0xA1300625 (L0087), again correct.  
• Mid-trace (Round 28):

• Near the end (Round 63):

  – Adding ch (0xDB18C265, L0953) gives 0xDBB5544E, exactly the step2 value on L0955.  
Every intermediate I recomputed (rotations/xors, additions with carries, etc.) agreed bit-for-bit with the trace, and no internal mismatch appeared. Since a single flipped bit would have made one of these checks fail, the whole trace must be internally correct.
